_description: Cover letter structure templates. LLM fills the [PLACEHOLDERS] rather than generating structure from scratch. Saves ~300 tokens per cover letter.

structure: Opening: Hook showing genuine interest + strongest fit point for THIS specific role
Middle: 2-3 specific quantified achievements that directly match the top JD requirements
Close: Confident call to action + availability
Opening: Strategic vision alignment — what you bring to their specific challenge
Middle: Two major leadership/impact stories with business outcomes
Close: Executive presence close — forward-looking partnership framing
